creator: damjan.jov@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 254238
Version 4 of the patch

New version of the patch. This version adds a flag, PKT_ALIAS_ENDPOINT_INDEPENDENT_MAPPING (maybe we should use a shorter name, like PKT_ALIAS_FULL_CONE_NAT?), which can be used to turn endpoint-independent mapping on and off. It is currently on by default, for better compatibility with the RFC and applications. It also adds documentation to the header file and man page, and wraps lines at 80 characters.
